name: Vanilla Wafer Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Vanilla wafers, crushed (12 oz. box)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and butter until fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
3. Incorporate the milk and crushed wafers into the mixture.
4. Fold in the coconut and pecans.
5. Pour the batter into a prepared tube or Bundt pan.
6. Bake at 300°F for 1 hour, or until done.
7. When the cake is finished baking, turn it off the oven and let cool in the pan on a rack for 15 minutes.
8. Turn the cake onto another rack (or the same rack) and allow it to continue cooling.
9. Once completely cooled, glaze, dust with powdered sugar, or ice as desired.
